summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 11.9°C) and outside temperature (down 11.6°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 12%).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in light levels (up 11545 lux) and cloud levels (up 375 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in light levels (up 15843 lux), the amount of wind (up 21 miles), cloud levels (up 260 m), and outside humidity (down 7%) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; prepare for cold, chilly weather ahead. Also, dry and less humid conditions and light winds will prevail. Showers, overcast skies with low cloud, and weak sunlight because of clouds. Little change in the weather.
